bigquery_technical_metadata.description: Technical Table: Ordertake performance data. Granularity: Per Market, Model, Channel, and Month. Source: SEER System. Dimensions and metrics designed for KPI tracking and performance analysis.Dimension related fields start with 'DIM_' and metric fields start with 'M_'.

DIM_YEARMONTH.calculation_logic: Derived from ROAR_DATE in Silver layer.

DIM_MARKET_NAME.description: Full name of the market or country.

DIM_MODEL_NAME.description: Vehicle model marketing name including variant.

M_OT_ACT.description: Actual order count. Number of customer orders placed in the system for the given period, market, model, and channel.
M_OT_ACT.calculation_logic: Sum of individual orders. Nulls converted to 0.

M_CAL_OT_OBJ.description: Calendarized Ordertake Objective target. Sales target adjusted for the number of working days passed in the month.
M_CAL_OT_OBJ.calculation_logic: Time-weighted objective for the specific period.

terms.definition: The official dataset for monitoring Ordertake performance against objectives. Used to assess market penetration and channel effectiveness.
The fiscal reporting month used for performance tracking.
The geographic entity where the vehicle is contracted (Ordertake), sold, and registered.
The marketing name of the vehicle model including variant designation.
The commercial channel through which the vehicle is contracted (Ordertake) and sold (e.g., Retail to private customers, Fleet to businesses).
The confirmed volume of customer contracted vehicle orders placed in the system.
The Ordertake target adjusted for the number of working days passed in the month.
Key Performance Indicator (KPI) measuring Ordertake performance. Calculated as Actuals divided by Calendarized Objective.
